title: tmesipteris tannensis var. elongata
intro: Tmesipteris tannensis var. elongata, also known as the fern ally Tmesipteris tannensis, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Psilotaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tmesipteris tannensis var. elongata include the ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
